name: Top K Frequent Words
description:
Given an array of strings words and an integer k, return the k most frequent strings.

The result must be sorted by:

  • Highest frequency first.
  • If two words have the same frequency, sort them in lexicographical (alphabetical) order.

Approach (Heap Based):

  • Count word frequencies using a HashMap.
  • Insert each [word, frequency] pair into a Min Heap of size k.
  • Heap comparison rule: lower frequency has higher priority. If frequencies are equal, lexicographically larger word has higher priority (so it gets removed first).
  • If heap size exceeds k, remove the smallest element.
  • Finally, extract elements from heap and reverse to get correct order.
